title: lithodora hispidula
intro: Lithodora hispidula, also known as California morning glory or hispid lithodora, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family. This plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and act as an antispasmodic. The health benefits of lithodora hispidula include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of lithodora hispidula can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
